full.description: Full SDLC: PRD -> TDD -> Implement -> Test -> Document -> Retrospect
full.template: Execute the full development lifecycle for: $ARGUMENTS

fast-path.description: Rapidly design, implement, and test a feature using light models
fast-path.template:
Create a brief tech spec, implement it, and verify with tests. Use @fast-architect, @implementer-flash, and @qa-engineer in this order.

$ARGUMENTS

quick-update.description: Minor code change, docs, and review using the Lite tier
quick-update.template:
Apply the change, document it, and perform a quick review. Use @implementer, @documenter-flash, and @reviewer-flash.

$ARGUMENTS

fix.description: Quickly diagnose and fix a specific bug or error
fix.template:
Analyze the error, implement a fix, review the changes, and verify with a quick regression test. Use @debugger, @implementer, @reviewer, and @qa-engineer-flash in this order.

$ARGUMENTS

brainstorm.description: Orchestrate a 'Mixture of Experts' brainstorming session to find the perfect solution

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features

bughunter.description: Scan for logic errors, security flaws, and code smells

review.description: Review code changes for correctness, quality, and potential issues
review.template:
Review the following code changes. Identify bugs, code smells, security issues, and improvement opportunities. Be specific and actionable.

$ARGUMENTS

debug.description: Diagnose and fix failing tests, stack traces, or runtime errors
debug.template:
Debug the following issue. Identify the root cause, explain why it occurs, and provide a fix.

$ARGUMENTS

test.description: Generate a test suite for the specified code or feature
test.template:
Generate a comprehensive test suite for the following. Cover happy paths, edge cases, and error conditions.

$ARGUMENTS

document.description: Generate documentation for code, APIs, or features
document.template:
Generate clear, thorough documentation for the following. Include usage examples where appropriate.

$ARGUMENTS

index.description: Generate a file index manifest for a directory or scope
index.template:
Scan the given scope and produce a checklist index of all analyzable source files. Save the index to docs/specs/indexes/.

$ARGUMENTS

audit.description: Full business logic audit: extract all logic into specs
audit.template:
Perform a full business logic audit. Exhaustively extract business logic from all unprocessed files in the index into structured specs under docs/specs/.

$ARGUMENTS

full-audit.description: Index all source files, then extract complete business logic specs
full-audit.template:
Step 1: Use @logic-indexer to scan the given scope and produce a file manifest index under docs/specs/indexes/. Step 2: Use @logic-extractor to process every unchecked file in the index and save specs to docs/specs/.

$ARGUMENTS

perf-analysis.description: Analyze the codebase for performance bottlenecks and inefficiencies

optimize-prompt.description: Optimize a raw prompt for perfect AI consumption

retrospect.description: Extract technical lessons and update project knowledge

codify.description: Immediately codify a specific lesson into project knowledge

ticket-validator.description: Grade ticket or PRD quality against project specs
